name: CrewSwarm
description: Dispatch tasks to a local CrewSwarm multi-agent crew from any OpenClaw agent. Adds the crewswarm_dispatch tool, /crewswarm slash command, and Gateway RPC methods.

url.description: Base URL of the CrewSwarm crew-lead HTTP server

pollIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to poll /api/status when waiting for a task result

pollTimeoutMs.description: Max time (ms) to wait for a dispatched task before giving up
